Add Trial-Level Data for Within-Subject Seed PLS

Source: R/builder_run.R
add_trial_data.Rd

Attaches trial-level beta matrices, seed data, and condition mappings to a PLS specification for use with method = "ws_seed".

Usage

add_trial_data(
  spec,
  beta_lst,
  seed_lst,
  condition_lst,
  groups = NULL,
  fisher_z = TRUE,
  min_trials = 3L
)

Arguments

spec

A pls_spec object.

beta_lst

A list of matrices (one per subject), each with rows = trials and columns = voxels.

seed_lst

A list of numeric vectors or matrices (one per subject) with the seed region's trial-level betas.

condition_lst

A list of integer vectors or factors (one per subject) mapping trials to conditions.

fisher_z

Logical; apply Fisher r-to-z transform (default TRUE).

min_trials

Minimum trials per condition for valid correlation (default 3).

Value

Updated pls_spec object.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
result <- pls_spec() |>
  add_trial_data(beta_lst, seed_lst, cond_lst) |>
  configure(method = "ws_seed", nperm = 500, nboot = 500) |>
  run()
} # }
